title: Level 917
wikitext:
{{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Chakra Petch'); /* Font */ html .resizable-container, .page-content h1, .page-content h2, .page-content h3, .page-content h4, .page-content h5, .page-content h6 { font-family: 'Chakra Petch'}} {{VoidedTheme}} {{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 917: "Abyssal Parking"}} {{Background|file=Abyssal parking 2.webp}}{{Image Banner|image=Abyssal parking 4.webp|caption=The raging storm against pure black skies.}}{{Alt Class|no=917|ext=2|env=2|ent=0}}'''Level 917''' is the 918th level of the Backrooms. == Description == {{Blurimage|file=Abyssal_parking_1.webp|caption=A common image of Level 917, depicting a distant lightning strike.|hovertext=It's bright from a distance.}} '''Level 917''', also known colloquially as '''Abyssal Parking''', is a large spherical plane appearing similar to that of an average parking lot with scattered light posts, and a never-ending, raging thunderstorm. The surface of the level is made of black asphalt with parking spaces painted on in white, the width of these parking spaces varies greatly from a few centimeters to around seventy-five meters. Some areas can also be painted with only straight lines for miles. All light posts in the level are scattered erratically, being in the middle of parking spaces, on the roads, and rarely can be seen clipping through each other. The lights inside the posts are basic halogen lights, with the posts being made out of pure aluminum. The constant thunderstorm in '''Level 917''' has been going since the level's discovery in 2004, even going on throughout when the lights went out during [[Phenomenon 12|The Flicker]]This includes the constant lightning strikes, as they did not stop either.. The rain in the level was discovered to be purified water, making it safe to collect and consumeThis also includes any water from puddles, as the level is completely sterile, it has also rained a diluted mixture of the purified water and [[Object 1|Almond Water]] in rare cases. Lightning strikes occur in '''Level 917''' exactly every fifteen seconds in a radius visible to any wanderer, the entire level is thought to experience around five-thousand lightning strikes a second. If any wanderer can see a lightning strike, one will hear it at around 80-120 decibels no matter how far it is from them. {{Blurimage|file=Abyssal_parking_3.webp|hovertext=It's blinding.|caption=An image of a brighter lightning strike.}} Wind speeds in '''Level 917''' have reached up to 75 miles per hour, with the average wind speed being around 35 miles per hour. Despite the extreme, stormy conditions, no clouds have ever been spotted in the sky, either thought to not exist, or be too dark to see compared to the sky. Along with the rain in the level is a heavy, low-hanging mist that increases the condensation into puddles along with the rain. '''Level 917''' was thought to have some sort of connection with [[Level 910]], as people sought after an explanation for why the level has a shallow ocean. Before the connection was debunked down to just an entrance into '''Level 917''', many believed that the constant storm created surface runoff that drained into Level 910. By travelingAn expedition by four wanderers that lasted around eight days. the full circumference of '''Level 917''', it has been proven that the level is non-Euclidean in nature, as the starting point was nowhere to be found once the predicted length was traveled. From the field of view, it is estimated that '''Level 917''' is a sphere measuring ten miles in width. Although due to the aforementioned non-Euclidean properties, the level's true size is unknown. The inky black skies of the level are thought to be [[The Void]], although further analysis has proven that it is simply a skybox like most other outdoor levels. The temperature of '''Level 917''' stays at a constant 15ºC/59ºF. For any wanderer that has been in '''Level 917''' for an extended amount of time, one is able to experience slight hallucinations, such as parked cars, the cessation of the thunderstorm, the Moon in the sky, or multiple other light posts. These hallucinations can be stopped by simply staying hydrated with Almond Water. An interesting feature of the light posts is that, by staring at the light, if one has poor vision, the light will somehow improve their vision, how this occurs is completely unknown. == Discovery == Although the first confirmed encounter with '''Level 917''' was on March 11, 2004, it turns out that the first ever mention of the level was on [[Backchat (Collaborative Log)|BackChat]] in November 2003, even being the first trueMany "levels" were just cases of [[Phenomenon 99|Temporary Manifestation]]. level discovered via the site. The post is shown below.
'''Scolded7238''' in '''/levels/''' As to where I am or how I got here, I don't know. I'm just wet, it's loud because of the thunder, and all I see for miles are just lights and rain. It looks like a parking lot, but it's all wrong. I've been here for like two days now, I got thirsty and drank the water to find out it's surprisingly clean. I'll post a photo below so people can try to find me. [[File:Abyssal parking 4.webp|500px]]
The current location of this wanderer is unknown. ==Entities == Despite being among the darker levels of the Backrooms, '''Level 917''' is completely barren of any life. == Bases, Communities, and Outposts== Although '''Level 917''' provides access to purified water and partially Almond Water, it still lacks most of the necessary resources to make a base of any kind. It is still used to collect the rain water in order to sustain bases in other levels. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances === *Entering a door in [[Level 269]] with "PARKING" printed on it will lead to this level. This exit is also seen in [[Level 238]] and [[Level 296]]. * Wandering far enough in [[Level 910]] will lead to a transition to this level. *No-clipping into a chrome light post in [[Level 916]] will lead here. ===Exits=== * Finding and entering an indoor area will lead to [[Level 22]]. This exit has been blocked off to prevent the [[Object 3|infection]] of '''Level 917'''. *Entering an area that appears to be a saturated blue will lead to [[Level 124]]. *No-clipping through a tiled section of road will lead to [[Level 989]]. *Entering a door with 959 in Roman numeralsCMLIX leads to [[Level 959|somewhere you don't want to know]]. *Finding a pathway leading away from the lot will lead to [[Level 918]], but this is not recommended as the destination is very dangerous. ---- {{Footnotes}} ----{{Collapse|num=999|initial='''Click for Author Information'''|final='''Close Author Information''' |body= '''Written by''': [[User:Arkansas Animations|Arkansas Animations]].
